name: Borax (Sodium Tetraborate)
description: A naturally occurring mineral salt of boron with alkaline pH, used as a water softener, laundry booster, and mild antiseptic.
appearance: White crystalline powder or granules; odorless
chemistry: Natural mineral. Softens water, boosts pH. Mild antiseptic. Best in hot water.
warnings: Keep from children/pets. Gloves. Washing soda is stronger alternative.
